data.name: StripoRama
data.detailed_description:
Jerry Wanker is back... and he’s going to Hollywood! (Well, sort of.)

After his last unforgettable adventure, Jerry decided to chase his ultimate dream: becoming a big-shot movie director. Armed with passion and a highly questionable portfolio, he confidently marched into the admissions building... and accidentally walked through the wrong door.

Now, Jerry finds himself sitting for the entrance exam of the infamous Nude York Film Academy. To get his acceptance letter, he has to prove he has the chops to write and direct the spiciest and funniest adult scripts in the industry!

Welcome to Striporama, a wildly fun narrative puzzle game where humor meets sex and sometimes meets logic.

GAMEPLAY

You’ll be given a blank storyboard and a cheeky movie title. Drag and drop characters, settings, and props into the panels to create a cinematic masterpiece that perfectly matches the prompt!

Actors react dynamically depending on who they are placed with, where they are, and what happened in the panel before. Put a strict boss and a clumsy secretary in the office, and watch the tension build. Add a jealous coworker to the next panel? Drama! Change the scene to the casting couch? Well... you get the idea.

Play around, experiment with absurd setups, and solve puzzles to help Jerry direct his way to the top!

FEATURES

  • 🎬 Direct the action: You are the mastermind behind the camera! Use logic and deduction to build a script that fits the title. Piece together the panels to create the perfect sequence of events leading to a very satisfying climax.

  • 🤣 The return of Jerry Wanker: Join your favorite hapless protagonist on his new quest for cinematic glory. Guide Jerry through his exams and help him become the celebrity he was always meant to be!

  • 🔥 Dynamic, spicy reactions: Every actor has unique desires, secrets, and triggers. Watch them flirt, fight, strip, or swoon depending on your directorial choices!

  • 🎭 A massive cast of tropes: Play with classic movie fantasies and hilarious stereotypes!

  • 🎥 Comic stories & blooper reels: Sometimes the wrong script is the most fun! Put your actors in the most awkward, absurd, or unexpectedly dirty situations possible.

  • 🎨 Enjoy high-quality, hand-drawn and beautifully animated uncensored art.

Are you ready? Grab your cast, set the scene, yell "Action!", and let the show begin!

data.short_description: Help Jerry Wanker pass his entrance exam to the prestigious Nude York Film Academy! Drag and drop actors, props, and settings into storyboards to craft hilarious movie scripts. Pucture Pizzle!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 法文, 義大利文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.8+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
